dimensions.label: Intent and funnel routing
dimensions.description: Correct intent, sub-intent, and funnel stage so the right workflow runs.

dimensions.label: Response quality
dimensions.description: Concise, on-brand replies that include and exclude the expected content.

dimensions.label: Commerce behavior
dimensions.description: Correct product/tool behavior, budget limits, stock handling, and cart surfaces.

dimensions.label: Guided next step
dimensions.description: Asks at most one useful question and exposes appropriate suggested actions.

dimensions.label: Reliability
dimensions.description: Produces a usable response without API/runtime failures.
